mapper.select: SELECT id, examPaperId, seq, qType, questionText, imageFileName, imageUrl, score, createdAt FROM qbank_question WHERE examPaperId = #{paperId} ORDER BY seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qbank_question (examPaperId, seq, qType, questionText, imageFileName, imageUrl, score) VALUES (#{examPaperId}, #{seq}, #{qType}, #{questionText}, #{imageFileName}, #{imageUrl}, #{score})
mapper.update: UPDATE qbank_question SET seq = #{seq}, qType = #{qType}, questionText = #{questionText}, imageFileName = #{imageFileName}, imageUrl = #{imageUrl}, score = #{score} WHERE id = #{id}
